final_prompt.prompt:
Create a short-form vertical video cover for an 8k GGU gaming monitor launch (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a minimalist premium aesthetic — exact restraint level and material choice are yours
Composition: must be rule-of-thirds composition
Subject: must include the monitor as focal product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" (large, primary title), "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" (secondary tagline)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must be vertical format optimized for short video cover; large bold title must be eye-catching and prominent
Avoid:
